title: Financial Valuation Foundations
description:
The Financial Valuation Foundations Open Course from Saïd Business School, University of Oxford equips you with essential financial knowledge to support executive-level decision-making and value creation within a firm. The course focuses on specific core themes, such as mastering fundamental financial principles and applying financial tools to guide strategic business decisions. You’ll explore the concept of the time value of money, learn about different project valuation methods, and analyse real-world investment opportunities using cash flow valuation techniques. 
 This course offers a foundational overview, introducing key concepts and frameworks for those new to the subject. To explore the topic in greater depth, you may wish to continue with  the full Oxford Executive Finance Programme.
